calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milton Katz for Petitioner.

Mr. Katz will submit a revised order making distribution to Trustee Bernard Krause. The Court granted the petition (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Continued To Dec-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milton Katz for Petitioner.

The matter was continued to December 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for service and notice of the amended petition. Notice is to be given no later than November 26, 2011. The Court also raised the issue of what the correct amount of cash is.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
